scope: Capture page top ratio alignment and lens control spacing polish

capture_screen: Moved the ratio/pixel menu next to the flash button to form a left-aligned top tool group.
Separated AE-L, lens focal buttons, and MF into auxiliary/main/auxiliary visual groups.
Added dense sizing for four-or-more focal controls without changing behavior.

top_bar.before: flash / spacer / ratio-pixel / spacer / camera / more

contracts.wb: unchanged; R65 takeover fix not touched

validation.simulator_observation: Top ratio/pixel button is now adjacent to flash. Simulator has no real lens capabilities, so the lens control strip shows AE-L / unavailable focal segment / MF with separated auxiliary controls.

risks: Dense mode spacing still needs real-device visual confirmation on narrow screens.
If four-focal devices still feel crowded, a follow-up can more strongly separate AE-L/MF from the centered focal group.
